visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with glasses and dark hair, dressed in a suit and tie. He has a serious and intense expression as he looks down and to his left. The background is dark and out of focus, with a bright, cool light illuminating the side of his face. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's focused demeanor. A man speaks in a low, serious, and commanding tone, his voice filled with urgency. He gives a direct order, saying, "通知他。" The camera angle shifts to a close-up of a pair of hands holding a silver, flip-style mobile phone. The hands are manipulating the phone, opening and closing it. The background remains dark and indistinct, with a soft, cool light source highlighting the hands and the phone. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," are still present in the upper left corner. The camera is static, maintaining a tight focus on the hands and the device. He continues with the same firm and decisive voice, "叫他先走。" The audio is quiet, with no background music or other sound effects, emphasizing the gravity of his words.
